title: ChatGPT
description:
Conversational AI assistant by OpenAI for writing, coding, and analysis.
Supports GPT-4o with image, voice, and file capabilities.

title: Claude
description:
Anthropic's AI assistant known for safety, nuance, and long-context reasoning.
Available via claude.ai with powerful document and code understanding.

title: Gemini
description:
Google's multimodal AI with deep integration into Google Workspace and Search.
Supports text, image, audio, and video understanding natively.

title: Midjourney
description:
Leading AI image generation tool known for stunning artistic quality.
Operated via Discord with a rich community of creators.

title: GitHub Copilot
description:
AI pair programmer that suggests code and entire functions in real time.
Deep IDE integration with VS Code, JetBrains, and more.

title: Perplexity AI
description:
AI-powered search engine that answers questions with cited sources.
Combines LLM reasoning with real-time web retrieval.

title: Runway ML
description:
Professional AI video generation and editing platform for creatives.
Supports text-to-video, image-to-video, and advanced motion tools.

title: ElevenLabs
description:
State-of-the-art AI voice cloning and text-to-speech synthesis.
Supports 30+ languages with ultra-realistic voice output.

title: Notion AI
description:
AI writing and productivity assistant built into Notion workspaces.
Helps summarize, draft, translate, and auto-fill databases.

title: Stable Diffusion
description:
Open-source text-to-image AI model that runs locally or in the cloud.
Highly customizable with thousands of community fine-tuned models.
